name: qonto-reconciliation
description: Automated bank reconciliation and receipt/invoice matching for Qonto transactions. Finds the right supporting document for every unreconciled payment (debit or credit) by researching every available channel — email, hosted links, web portals, local files, web search — verifies the match, and attaches it via the Qonto MCP. Learns supplier-specific retrieval patterns over time so each run gets faster and more automatic.
